title: JSA advises Hexagon AB on sale of Design & Engineering business to Cadence Design Systems
description: Hexagon AB has made a sale of its Design & Engineering business to Cadence Design Systems, Inc. for an aggregate purchase price of approximately €2.7 billion in cash and Cadence stock.JSA Advocates & Solicitors advised Hexagon AB on this transaction.The transaction team was led by Sidharrth Shankar (Partner), with support from Nandini Seth (Partner), Dhruv Malhotra (Partner), Eksha Narayan (Senior Associate) and Aditya Sinha (Associate).The D&E Business of Hexagon AB is a leading pro
